channel.title: Prasad Gade — Blog
channel.description: 100% human written thoughts on tech, data, building things, and whatever else catches my attention. No AI content. No fluff. Just honest writing.

item.title: Agent Readiness on Websites...
item.description: Recently I made my portfolio website agent-ready. You might ask what exactly do I mean by making my site agent ready? Well, in today's landscape, AI agents have access to web searching tools. This means that AI agents can access the internet, access URLs and fetch data from them. But the issue is, via normal scraping, such agents may fetch the incorrect...
item.author: prasadgade4405@gmail.com (Prasad Gade)

item.title: Introduction: My Blogging Journey
item.description: A very warm welcome to my blog space. With this blog I begin a new journey of writing about things that happen to catch my interest. First let me introduce myself: I am a 21-year-old who is currently into computers, data, AI and building stuff with a combination of these. For the past few years, I have been experimenting with a lot of stuff, building and...
item.author: prasadgade4405@gmail.com (Prasad Gade)
